title: CFTC backs crypto perpetual contracts, issues advisory on 24/7 trading
summary: The CFTC issued notices affecting platforms seeking to offer cryptocurrency perpetual futures contracts, including a no-action position for Coinbase and approval for Kalshi.

title: Sui network temporarily stalls again after Thursday's outage
summary: The outage was caused by the same network update software bug that disrupted the protocol on Thursday, which resulted in nearly six hours of downtime.

title: Citadel Securities Loses Court Fight Over New IEX Options Venue
summary: Citadel Securities lost its bid to block IEX Group Inc. from launching a new type of options exchange that intentionally slows orders, after a federal appeals court on Friday rejected the market maker’s challenge.

title: SpaceX Wins $4 Billion Contract for US Golden Dome Satellites
summary:
SpaceX has won a contract for more than $4 billion to build satellites to track foreign aircraft and missiles as part of President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome defensive shield.
Bloomberg's Sana Pashanka reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'He’s Full of Shit': JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon Takes Aim at Coinbase CEO Over Clarity Act
summary: Dimon vowed to fight the passage of the crypto market structure bill until the bitter end.

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent Says US Has 'Grabbed' $1 Billion in Crypto From Iran
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. has "outright grabbed" roughly $1 billion worth of cryptocurrencies from Iran via seizures.

title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iran, Bessent says
summary: Earlier this year, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. had seized "nearly $500 million" in Iranian crypto assets.

title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon blasts Coinbase’s Brian Armstrong, plans to fight Clarity Act
summary: Dimon said Coinbase's Armstrong is spending hundreds of millions of dollars trying to get Clarity Act passed.

title: US stocks post longest weekly winning streak since 2023
summary: AI enthusiasm and hopes for deal to extend US-Iran ceasefire boost markets

title: Trump pledges ‘final determination’ on Iran deal to extend ceasefire
summary: US president seeks agreement on ‘unrestricted traffic’ in Strait of Hormuz
